summary: Audited representative next-action recommendation/execution alignment and found a new recommendation-layer residual: the draft-stage submit-project rule expression currently fails safe_eval due to XML indentation, even though the representative actions that are emitted now execute successfully.

notes: Representative emitted recommendations now execute correctly on the corrected dispatcher baseline.
The submit-project recommendation rule is currently suppressed by a condition_expr formatting problem rather than by ACL or dispatcher logic.
A narrow implementation batch is needed before draft-stage next-action acceptance can be considered complete.

next_step: Open a narrow implementation batch to normalize or rewrite the affected next-action rule expression so draft-stage recommendation evaluation is stable.
